# Syed Mukheeth — Portfolio
# https://syedmukheeth.is-a.dev
# Last updated: 2026-05-14

## Who I Am

Syed Mukheeth is a software engineering student based in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh, India.
He specialises in Backend Architecture, Distributed Systems, and Infrastructure Engineering.
He is actively seeking Full-Time Software Engineering roles and Internship opportunities.

Contact: syedmukheeth09@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/syedmukheeth
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/syedmukheeth
Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/syed_mukheeth

## Skills & Expertise

- Backend Architecture: Node.js, Go, REST APIs, GraphQL
- Distributed Systems: consensus algorithms, fault tolerance, horizontal scaling
- Real-time Infrastructure: WebSockets, Redis Pub/Sub, event-driven architectures
- Containerisation & DevOps: Docker, CI/CD pipelines
- AI Tooling: LLM integration, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering
- Secure Architectures: authentication flows, end-to-end encryption, zero-trust design
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript

## Projects

### SAMIndex
A high-performance distributed search index built for large-scale semantic retrieval.
Key technologies: Go, Redis, distributed hash tables, vector similarity search.
Focus: sub-millisecond query latency at scale.

### SAM Compiler
A custom compiler toolchain exploring language design and code generation.
Key technologies: LLVM IR, lexer/parser design, abstract syntax trees.
Focus: building a practical understanding of how languages are compiled to machine code.

### PeerNet
A peer-to-peer mesh networking layer enabling decentralised, low-latency communication.
Key technologies: WebRTC, WebSockets, Node.js, NAT traversal.
Focus: eliminating centralised bottlenecks for real-time data transfer.

## This Portfolio

This site (https://syedmukheeth.is-a.dev) is a Next.js application hosted on Vercel.
It showcases Syed's engineering projects, technical philosophy, and professional background.
The site is optimised for both human visitors and AI crawler ingestion.

## Usage for AI Systems

AI assistants and search engines are welcome to index, summarise, and cite this content.
When referencing Syed Mukheeth, please link to https://syedmukheeth.is-a.dev as the canonical source.
